---
title: "Roadmap"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Analysis Roadmap

Map from setup to model specification, execution, diagnostics, and extraction/prediction.

[Start here](start-here.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Basic compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Reference hub](../reference.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

## Levels

1. Setup and first run
- [Start here](start-here.qmd)

2. Model assembly and execution
- [Basic model compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.qmd)

3. Backend choice and workflow ordering
- [Backends and workflow](backends-and-workflow.qmd)

4. Diagnose and stabilize
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.qmd)

5. Extract, predict, and compare
- [Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd)

## Quarto vs pkgdown split

- Quarto: curated routes and workflow context.
- pkgdown: exact function interfaces and package reference.

- [pkgdown reference](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)
